case_title: FOX RENT A CAR, INC. VS. GEORGE R. JENSEN et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-10-2010 CONTINUED TO NOV-12-2010 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212, FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FOX RENT A CAR, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JENSEN, GEORGE R. $2,880.97 PRINCIPAL, $600.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $247.50 INTEREST, $315.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,043.47, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
